LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S ANSWER. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF RODNEY HAMPTON'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S ANSWER IS DENIED. SEE MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. THE MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT TO DEPT. 302 A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: R. WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Defendant'S Answer
Off Calendar May-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RODNEY HAMPTON'S Motion To Strike Defendant'S Answer.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Rodney Hampton's Motion To Strike Defendant's Answer is DENIED.

Plaintiff's proof of service shows Plaintiff served his moving papers on Defendant by US Mail at an address on Market Street in San Francisco. Defendant's address on file with the court, which is what controls, is on Woodward Avenue in Maywood, California. The motion not being properly served on Defendant, it is denied. Defendant's answer stands.

The moving Party is ordered to prepare and submit to Dept. 302 a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the court's tentative ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Denied
